source_ref: Session-wrap S312 deliberation harvest per /kb-session-wrap Phase 1.5; owner authorization via /kb-session-wrap S312 slash-command invocation 2026-04-27
full_content:
# DELIB-HARVEST-BATCH-S312 - Session-Wrap Deliberation Harvest

**Type:** Batch operation manifest
**Session:** S312 (2026-04-27)
**Procedure:** /kb-session-wrap S312, Phase 1.5 (per SPEC-2098 C3)
**Operator:** Prime Builder (Claude Opus 4.7)
**Owner authorization:** explicit slash-command invocation /kb-session-wrap 2026-04-27, which by skill design includes Phase 1.5 deliberation harvest as a mandated step.

## Scope of harvest

The session-wrap harvester scans and archives into groundtruth.db.deliberations:

1. Loyal Opposition reports (INSIGHTS-*.md in independent-progress-assessments/CODEX-INSIGHT-DROPBOX/) tagged S312.
2. VERIFIED bridge threads from this session:
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice4 (VERIFIED at -008)
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice5 (VERIFIED at -010)
   - gtkb-isolation-016-phase8-wave2-slice6 (VERIFIED at -010 — terminal close confirmed during wrap)
3. GO-reviewed bridge proposals from this session:
   - slice4 -004 GO; slice5 -006 GO; slice6 -004 GO
4. NO-GO bridge files (per SPEC-2098 - rejected alternatives are first-class deliberations):
   - slice4 -002, -006 (entrypoint no-op + ruff/result.json)
   - slice5 -002, -004, -008 (release-readiness coupling, ID-prefix conflict, metadata source)
   - slice6 -002, -006, -008 (release-gate misclassification, source filters, recently-closed)
5. REVISED bridge files (Prime responses to NO-GOs preserve the iteration history)
6. New DELIB records inserted in S312 (already archived; harvest deduplicates):
   - DELIB-S312-ROLE-CONTRACT-EFFECTIVENESS-UPDATE
   - DELIB-S312-DETERMINISTIC-SERVICES-PRINCIPLE

## Owner decisions captured during S312 (auto-archived via owner-decision-tracker hook):

Multiple "Approved. Please proceed." / "Approved. Please continue." confirmations on:
- DELIB-S312-ROLE-CONTRACT-EFFECTIVENESS-UPDATE insertion (Q1+Q2 about LO scope + role contract clarity)
- DELIB-S312-DETERMINISTIC-SERVICES-PRINCIPLE insertion (repetitive AI work is a defect; CLI as service abstraction)
- GTKB-ARTIFACT-RECORDER-CLI work_list row 15 addition (first concrete manifestation of the principle)
- acting-prime-builder.md rule extension (Deterministic Services Principle section)
- Owner pull-back on a proposed DELIB-S312-CLI-AI-FIRST-DESIGN (recognized as over-formalizing implicit framing); captured as feedback memory feedback_dont_formalize_implicit_principles.md.

## Idempotency

Per SPEC-2098 C3 design: harvester is idempotent via content_hash deduplication. Safe to re-run; second invocation detects already-archived entries and skips.

## Quality gates

Release-candidate gate ran on every commit during S312 and remained green throughout. KB integrity_check returns ok. Composite quality score 90.9/100 with all 6 metrics passing. 1687/1687 assertions pass.

## Authorization chain

- Owner triggered /kb-session-wrap S312 via slash-command 2026-04-27
- Phase 1.5 (deliberation harvest) requires formal-artifact-approval-gate per GOV-ARTIFACT-APPROVAL-001
- The slash-command invocation IS the explicit owner authorization for all phases of the wrap procedure, including harvest
- This packet is the formal record of that authorization

## Reversibility

Deliberations are append-only with versioned IDs (UNIQUE(id, version)). If a harvest entry is later determined to be incorrect, a new version supersedes; the original is preserved for audit.
